examples: The pristine waters around the Antarctic will disappear forever.
Krill fishing in the Antarctic has worsened the pollution of the pristine waters.
Now elsewhere in the world, Iceland may be spoken of, somewhat breathlessly, as western Europe's last pristine wilderness.
Oysters grown in pristine northern waters, say Maine or Washington, have extremely low incidence of bacteria.
The lush pine forest that covered every inch of these pristine mountains had been cleared here.
